ext.name: Мониторинг сервера
ext.description: Track uptime for websites, APIs, and hosts with local checks and browser alerts.

dashboard.title: Server status
dashboard.empty_subtitle: Add a URL to start tracking uptime

add_monitor.title: Add monitor
add_monitor.hint_host: Checks HTTP/HTTPS availability for this host
add_monitor.hint_url: Name will be set automatically from domain
add_monitor.error_invalid_host: Enter a valid host, IP, or HTTP/HTTPS URL
add_monitor.error_invalid_url: Enter a valid http or https URL

settings.title: Settings
settings.connectivity_hint: Uses an HTTP/HTTPS check in Chromium. Change if Google DNS is blocked
settings.error_invalid_ping_target: Enter a valid host, IP, or HTTP/HTTPS URL
settings.error_unable_to_save_ping_target: Unable to save ping URL right now
settings.error_unable_to_clear: Unable to clear monitors right now
settings.error_unable_to_update_notifications: Unable to update notifications right now
settings.error_unable_to_update_interval: Unable to update the default interval right now

monitor.error_check_failed: Unable to complete the latest check

monitor_details.error_check_now: Unable to run a manual check right now
monitor_details.error_toggle: Unable to update this monitor right now
monitor_details.error_delete: Unable to delete this monitor right now

notification.down_message: The latest uptime check failed for $1.
